zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Ormsby於1580年出生在英國林可爾史爾阿福德時，他的父親Thomas Ormsby40歲，母親Lady Mary Malby27歲。他於1602年7月1日與Mary Underwood在英國林可爾史爾阿福德結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1664年6月10日在英國林可爾史爾波斯頓享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Ormsby于1580年出生在英国林可爾史爾阿福德时，他的父亲Thomas Ormsby40岁，母亲Lady Mary Malby27岁。他于1602年7月1日与Mary Underwood在英国林可爾史爾阿福德结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1664年6月10日在英国林可爾史爾波斯頓享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ormsby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from North and South Ormsby (Lincolnshire), or either of two places called Ormesby in Norfolk and the North Yorkshire. The placenames all derive from the Old Norse personal name Ormr + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. This surname is also common in Ireland (Connacht), where it has been established since the late 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Ormsby was born in 1580, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Ormsby, was 40 and his mother, Lady Mary Malby, was 27. He married Mary Underwood on 1 July 1602, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 10 June 1664, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Ormsby est né en 1580, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Ormsby, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Malby, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary Underwood le 1 juillet 1602, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 10 juin 1664, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Ormsbyが1580年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Ormsbyは40歳，母Lady Mary Malbyは27歳であった。1602年7月1日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードでMary Underwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1664年6月10日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Ormsby(이)가 1580년 영국 링코실르 알퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ormsby(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Malby(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1602년 7월 1일 영국 링코실르 알퍼드에서 Mary Underwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1664년 6월 10일 영국 링코실르 보스턴에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Ormsby родился в 1580 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Ormsby было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Malby, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Underwood 1 июля 1602 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 10 июня 1664 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.
